plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Collaborative creative writing studio. Full refinement pipeline: planning, drafting, 5-stage editing, continuity checking, and SQLite-backed knowledge base.

plugins.name: kg
plugins.description: Universal Knowledge Graph. Semantic search, knowledge ingestion, and per-project scoping via Graphiti + Neo4j.

plugins.name: union-writer
plugins.description: Output style: collaborative writing partner for DFW-influenced literary fiction.

plugins.name: library
plugins.description: Research library pipeline. Search LibGen, download books, convert EPUB/PDF to chapter-structured markdown, and ingest into the Knowledge Graph.

plugins.name: autopilot
plugins.description: Project-scoped autopilot mode. Toggles auto-approval of all tool calls via a .autopilot marker file in the working directory.

plugins.name: jarvis
plugins.description: Personal AI assistant orchestrator. Unified commands, skills, and agents for email triage, calendar briefings, budget tracking, and cross-domain synthesis.

plugins.name: jarvis-email
plugins.description: IMAP email MCP server. List, search, move, flag, trash, archive emails via mailbox.org.

plugins.name: jarvis-calendar
plugins.description: CalDAV calendar MCP server. List events, todos, create events via mailbox.org.

plugins.name: jarvis-contacts
plugins.description: CardDAV contacts MCP server. Search, get, create, update contacts via mailbox.org.

plugins.name: jarvis-budget
plugins.description: YNAB budget MCP server. View categories, transactions, categorize, and approve.

plugins.name: jarvis-files
plugins.description: File management MCP server. Inbox, outbox, archive, and WebDAV sync.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Foundry VTT co-MC integration. Skills for prep-case workflow (NPCs, scenes, SessionFlow, character panels, link references, Obsidian Bridge handoff).
